title: Ovsienko–Redou module aggregate
summary: Provides a single import path for the OR index, coefficient, operator-data, defect-cancellation, and closed-operator layers.

mathematicalContent.heading: Module role
mathematicalContent.body: This file only re-exports the OR closed-operator stack and introduces no declarations of its own.

mathematicalContent.heading: Included pipeline
mathematicalContent.body: The imported layers pass from degree-N indices and rational coefficients to finite ambient bidifferential sums, then to conditional tangentiality through defect cancellation.

references.locator: Classification of invariant bilinear differential operators
references.note: Flat-model origin of the coefficient family.
Primary curved ambient source for the encoded OR recurrence.

limitations: The aggregate itself proves nothing. In particular, importing OR does not mean that the geometric defect expansion or the full closed-coefficient cancellation theorem has been established.
